• Provides a full‑screen canvas game with responsive UI, mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, admin panel and multiple modals.
  • Implements procedural world generation, mining mechanics (including AOE), building, explosives, fuel/health management, and a shop system with upgrades.
  • Includes networking (MQTT), sound engine, custom texture support, cloud sync, save management, and a configurable settings UI.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Shop = new ShopSystem();

This HTML/CSS/JS project creates a mining‑simulation game called “Mega Miner NG,” handling map generation, player interaction, UI overlay, audio, networking, and persistent saves while offering extensive customization through settings and modals.
